text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 158 

TCHNG_IND 

LABEL: Provider Organization Teaching Facility Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: A code indicating if the provider’s organization is a teaching facility; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: TCHNG_IND 

LONG NAME: TCHNG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
